caption.full:
Sam Neill, Jurassic Park star, dies at 78

The actor, known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant, passed away in Sydney at age 78. His family confirmed the news in a statement. Neill's career began with his first major role in the 1977 film Sleeping Dogs.

What moment of Sam Neill’s work will stay with you most?

caption.firstComment: Thinking of Sam Neill and the awe he brought to every role — The Piano, Jurassic Park, Peaky Blinders. Which performance of his shaped your love for cinema?

facebook.text: Jurassic Park star Sam Neill has died at age 78. The beloved actor, who played Dr. Alan Grant, passed away in Sydney after a public battle with cancer. He announced he was in remission earlier this year. Share your favorite memory of Sam Neill in the comments.

youtube.title: Sam Neill Dies at 78; Jurassic Park Star Battled Cancer
youtube.description:
Sam Neill, the actor known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in Jurassic Park, has died at age 78. His family confirmed his passing in Sydney, Australia. Neill had been diagnosed with stage 3 cancer in 2022 but announced he was in remission earlier this year. He is survived by four children and eight grandchildren.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
